name: codex-option-prompts
description: Automatically route every Codex user question to a lightweight Windows wizard.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically open every user question in the wizard.
interface.longDescription: Uses lifecycle hooks to route every clarification, confirmation, open-ended question, and single- or multi-select choice directly to the ask_options MCP tool and lightweight Windows WPF wizard without shell-based text transport.
defaultPrompt: Ask me a clickable option question.
